metadata.description: Deploy Azure Monitor Workbooks for Intune Analytics
Name of the Log Analytics workspace

properties.serializedData:
{"version":"Notebook/1.0","items":[{"type":1,"content":{"json":"# 🎯 Intune Compliance Overview
---
Monitor device compliance status across your Intune environment."},"name":"header"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"IntuneComplianceStates_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by DeviceId, PolicyId
| summarize Compliant=countif(Status == 'compliant'), NonCompliant=countif(Status == 'noncompliant'), Total=count()
| extend ComplianceRate=round(100.0 * Compliant / Total, 1)
| project strcat(ComplianceRate, '%')","size":4,"title":"Overall Compliance Rate","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"tiles"},"name":"compliance-rate"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"IntuneComplianceStates_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by DeviceId, PolicyId
| summarize Count=count() by Status
| order by Count desc","size":2,"title":"📊 Compliance by Status","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"piechart"},"name":"compliance-status"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"IntuneComplianceStates_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by DeviceId, PolicyId
| where Status == 'noncompliant'
| summarize NonCompliant=count() by PolicyName
| top 10 by NonCompliant
| order by NonCompliant desc","size":0,"title":"❌ Top 10 Policies with Non-Compliant Devices","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"barchart"},"name":"worst-policies"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"IntuneComplianceStates_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by DeviceId, PolicyId
| where Status == 'noncompliant'
| project DeviceName, UserPrincipalName, PolicyName, FailedSettingCount, TimeGenerated
| top 20 by TimeGenerated desc","size":0,"title":"🔴 Non-Compliant Devices (Recent)","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table"},"name":"noncompliant-devices"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"IntuneDevices_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by DeviceId
| summarize Total=count(), Compliant=countif(ComplianceState == 'compliant') by OperatingSystem
| extend Rate=round(100.0 * Compliant / Total, 1)
| project OperatingSystem, Compliant, Total, Rate
| order by Total desc","size":0,"title":"💻 Compliance by Operating System","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table"},"name":"compliance-by-os"}],"isLocked":false}

{"version":"Notebook/1.0","items":[{"type":1,"content":{"json":"# 💚 Intune Device Health
---
Overview of device health scores, activity, and performance metrics."},"name":"header"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"IntuneDevices_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by DeviceId
| count","size":4,"title":"📱 Total Managed Devices","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"tiles"},"name":"total-devices"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"IntuneDeviceScores_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by DeviceId
| summarize round(avg(EndpointAnalyticsScore), 1)","size":4,"title":"💚 Average Health Score","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"tiles"},"name":"avg-health"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"IntuneDeviceScores_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by DeviceId
| where EndpointAnalyticsScore < 50
| count","size":4,"title":"⚠️ Poor Health (<50)","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"tiles"},"name":"poor-health"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"IntuneDevices_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by DeviceId
| extend DaysSinceSync=datetime_diff('day', now(), LastSyncDateTime)
| where DaysSinceSync > 14
| count","size":4,"title":"👻 Stale (>14 days)","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"tiles"},"name":"stale-count"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"IntuneDeviceScores_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by DeviceId
| extend ScoreBucket=case(EndpointAnalyticsScore >= 80, '80-100 Excellent', EndpointAnalyticsScore >= 60, '60-79 Good', EndpointAnalyticsScore >= 40, '40-59 Fair', EndpointAnalyticsScore >= 20, '20-39 Poor', '0-19 Critical')
| summarize Count=count() by ScoreBucket
| order by ScoreBucket asc","size":2,"title":"📊 Health Score Distribution","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"piechart"},"name":"health-dist"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"IntuneDevices_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by DeviceId
| summarize Count=count() by OperatingSystem
| order by Count desc","size":2,"title":"💻 Devices by OS","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"piechart"},"name":"os-dist"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"IntuneDeviceScores_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by DeviceId
| join kind=inner (IntuneDevices_CL | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by DeviceId | project DeviceId, DeviceName, UserPrincipalName) on DeviceId
| where EndpointAnalyticsScore < 50
| project DeviceName, UserPrincipalName, EndpointAnalyticsScore, StartupPerformanceScore, AppReliabilityScore, HealthStatus
| top 15 by EndpointAnalyticsScore asc","size":0,"title":"🔴 Worst Health Devices","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table"},"name":"worst-devices"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"IntuneDevices_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by DeviceId
| extend DaysSinceSync=datetime_diff('day', now(), LastSyncDateTime)
| where DaysSinceSync > 14
| project DeviceName, UserDisplayName, OperatingSystem, DaysSinceSync, LastSyncDateTime
| top 20 by DaysSinceSync desc","size":0,"title":"👻 Stale Devices List","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table"},"name":"stale-devices"}],"isLocked":false}

{"version":"Notebook/1.0","items":[{"type":1,"content":{"json":"# 📱 Intune Device Inventory
---
Complete device inventory with filtering and search."},"name":"header"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"IntuneDevices_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by DeviceId
| summarize Count=count() by Manufacturer
| top 10 by Count
| order by Count desc","size":2,"title":"🏭 Devices by Manufacturer","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"piechart"},"name":"by-manufacturer"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"IntuneDevices_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by DeviceId
| summarize Count=count() by Model
| top 15 by Count
| order by Count desc","size":0,"title":"📊 Top 15 Device Models","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"barchart"},"name":"by-model"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"IntuneDevices_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by DeviceId
| summarize Encrypted=countif(IsEncrypted == true), NotEncrypted=countif(IsEncrypted == false or isnull(IsEncrypted))
| extend EncryptionRate=round(100.0 * Encrypted / (Encrypted + NotEncrypted), 1)
| project strcat('Encrypted: ', Encrypted, ' (', EncryptionRate, '%)')","size":4,"title":"🔐 Encryption Status","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"tiles"},"name":"encryption"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"IntuneDevices_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by DeviceId
| project DeviceName, UserDisplayName, UserPrincipalName, OperatingSystem, OSVersion, Model, Manufacturer, ComplianceState, IsEncrypted, EnrolledDateTime, LastSyncDateTime
| order by LastSyncDateTime desc","size":0,"title":"📋 Full Device Inventory","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"filter":true}},"name":"full-inventory"}],"isLocked":false}
